title: Smoky Smoked White Yam Stir-fry
description: A smoky and creamy Moroccan-inspired dish featuring white yam that is both flavorful and diabetic-friendly for a date-night meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup white yam, peeled and diced
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's thoroughly cooked before stir-frying

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup water
ingredients.notes: To help soften yam and prevent sticking

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté until translucent and fragrant, about 5 minutes.
Add diced white yam and water to the skillet. Stir well to combine.
Cover and simmer for about 10-12 minutes or until the yam is tender and easily mashed with a fork.
Stir in canned tomatoes, cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
